zh.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾布拉可維爾
zh.St. Michael, Bracewell, Yorkshire, Engla: 英國越可爾布拉可維爾
zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempest是Richard IV Tempest的兒子，於1283年8月24日出生在英國越可爾布拉可維爾。他和Isabel至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1356年6月25日之後在英國藍卡爾瓦丁頓。

zh-hans.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾布拉可維爾
zh-hans.St. Michael, Bracewell, Yorkshire, Engla: 英国越可爾布拉可維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempest是Richard IV Tempest的儿子，于1283年8月24日出生在英国越可爾布拉可維爾。他和Isabel至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1356年6月25日之后在英国藍卡爾瓦丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Tempest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): nickname for someone with a blustery temperament, from Middle English, Old French tempest(e) ‘storm’ (from Latin tempestas ‘weather, season’, a derivative of tempus ‘time’).

variants.name: Tempesta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Raffaele, Agostino, Angelo, Carmelo, Cesare, Cesidio, Dante, Elio, Ezio, Gino.
Italian: nickname for someone with a stormy temperament, from tempesta ‘storm, tempest’ (see Tempest ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempest was born on 24 August 1283, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England as the son of Richard IV Tempest. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Isabel. He died after 25 June 1356, in Waddington, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempest est né le 24 août 1283, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de Richard IV Tempest. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Isabel. Il est décédé après 25 juin 1356, à Waddington, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempest wurde am 24. August 1283 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, als Sohn von Richard IV Tempest geboren. Er hatte mit Isabel mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 25. Juni 1356 in Waddington, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempest è nato il il 24 agosto 1283 nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England come figlio di Richard IV Tempest. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Isabel. Morì dopo il 25 giugno 1356, nel Waddington, Lancashire, England.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエル
ja.St. Michael, Bracewell, Yorkshire, Engla: イギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエル
ja.Waddington, Yorkshire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアワッドイントン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempestは1283年8月24日にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルでRichard IV Tempestの息子として生まれた。彼はIsabelとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1356年6月25日以後にイギリスランカシュアイアワッドイントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempest(은)는 1283년 8월 24일 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 Richard IV Tempest의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Isabel(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년 6월 25일 이후 영국 랭카실르 와딩턴에서 사망했다.

mn.24 August 1283–after 25 June 1356: 1283 оны Наймдугаар сарын 24–1356 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 25–наас хойш

pt.24 August 1283–after 25 June 1356: 24 de agosto de 1283–após 25 de junho de 1356
pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempest nasceu em 24 de agosto de 1283, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filho de Richard IV Tempest. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Isabel. Ele faleceu após 25 de junho de 1356, em Waddington, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempest родился 24 августа 1283 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия. Его отца звали Richard IV Tempest. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Isabel. Он умер после 25 июнь 1356 г. в местности ваддингтон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.24 August 1283–after 25 June 1356: 24 de agosto de 1283–después de 25 de junio de 1356
es.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempest nació el 24 de agosto de 1283, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Richard IV Tempest. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Isabel. Murió después de 25 de junio de 1356, en Waddington, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
